Experiments

Things worth trying

A running log of experiments — some live, some in progress, some just ideas. Status is honest.

Live

Florida Politics

An interactive exploration of how Florida has shifted politically over time. Tracks gubernatorial primary and general election results by county alongside legislative party balance from 1992 to 2024.

Live Data / Politics View → GitHub →

Portuguese Phrases for Tidbyt

A Tidbyt app that cycles through European Portuguese phrases and words on the device display. Built for daily passive exposure to the language.

Live Tool

Where Now?

A random food and trip generator for the Lisbon area. Useful when you can't decide where to eat or what to do next.

Live Tool View → GitHub →

Archived

URL Readability Scorer

An Excel macro that parses a list of URLs and returns Flesch Reading Ease and Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level scores for each page's content. A content audit utility from an earlier era.

Archived Tool

Macropad Hotkeys

Custom hotkey layout for the Adafruit Macropad RP2040. A personal fork with tweaked key mappings for a physical shortcut pad.

Archived Hardware

Office JS Snippets

A collection of code snippets for Office add-in development using Script Lab. Forked and maintained as a personal reference for Office JS work.

Archived Tool
